system_profile.name: Temple University Health System
system_profile.description: Major academic health system in North Philadelphia affiliated with Temple University Lewis Katz School of Medicine. Known nationally for pulmonary medicine and lung transplant programs. Operates Temple University Hospital, Jeanes Hospital, and Fox Chase Cancer Center.
